name: audio-jingle
tagline: Routes music, voiceover/TTS, and SFX requests to AI audio models (Suno, MiniMax TTS, ElevenLabs, AudioCraft) via a unified dispatcher.
verdict: Well-structured and deterministic audio-generation workflow with concrete commands, defaults, and a defined output contract; weak spots are the missing negative-trigger scoping, no guidance for dispatcher/API failures, and no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or scope-exclusion text anywhere in the file.
Only the happy-path dispatcher output is described; no guidance if the dispatcher errors, times out, or the provider rejects the request.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the file.
